title: Lifesteal: FairPlay Edition
description: A Lifesteal Minecraft mod without craftable hearts to avoid grinders ruining the playing experience of others
body:
This is a normal Lifesteal mod with heart transfer on player kills and a command to do it manually. It aims for fair play, as there is no crafting recipe for hearts, so that grinders can't ruin the playing experience for others. There is also no ban if you get killed with only one heart remaining, since this would also ruin the experience for many. In future versions, a config file may be added for full customization of features. ### /hearts command Syntax:
`/hearts get` : prints max health of player
`/hearts set ` : sets max health of player in hearts from 1 to 30
`/hearts reset` : resets health of player to 10 hearts
This command works with every player selector, for example @a
